brand, model, variant, sku,

upc, ean, asin

span.p:
resolveIdentityLabel():
match=true → 'matched'
criticalConflicts → 'different'
score ≥ 0.4 → 'possible'
default → 'different'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source filtering:
'different' → rejected
'matched' / 'possible' → pass

TIER_WEIGHT × METHOD_WEIGHT
Tier 1: 1.0, Tier 2: 0.8
Tier 3: 0.45

track approvedDomainCount

span.p:
Strict acceptance:
≥ 2 approved domains
AND best ≥ 1.1× second
Instrumented: + ≥ 3 lab sources

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Confidence:
base: 0.7 (if ≥2 approved)
+0.2 if weighted majority
+0.1 if high method score

1. Regex Patterns
parseRegexPatterns()
template.patterns[].regex
+ contextMatch (pos/neg kw)
confidence: 0.95

span.p:
2. Spec Table Match
parseSpecRows()
split on | delimiter
fuzzy match ≥ 0.78
confidence: 0.80-0.98

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. JSON-LD Path
parseJsonLd()
explicit path → fallback paths
(field, additionalProperty)
confidence: 0.90

Phase 1: Best candidate
per field with component_db_ref
score: table=4, template=3,
json_ld=2, other=1

against component DB
threshold: 0.7 (configurable)
infer properties → fields
via PROPERTY_FIELD_MAP

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Confidence by variance:
authoritative: 0.85
upper/lower_bound: 0.80
range: 0.75
override_allowed: 0.60

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Phase 3: Constraints
evaluateAllConstraints()
direct violation: ×0.5
indirect violation: ×0.85

Batch processing:
max 7 batches/product

900 chars/snippet

Evidence scoping:
hintHits: 5× score

dimensionSignal: 2×
textType: 1×

LLM call:
multimodal (text + images)
JSON schema output
max tokens: 1200
reasoning budget: 4096

span.p:
Sanitization:
validate evidence refs
drop unknown fields
drop invalid/missing refs
method: llm_extract

16. Embedded state (6)
